summary: Iteration 75: P0 Tasks Validation - Employee=Sales SSOT, Data Sheet Karyawan binding, Full Edit. ALL APIS PASS. UI verified via Playwright.

Returns 400: 'sales_code SLS-002 sudah digunakan oleh ADELLA SAFIRA'
GET /api/erp/employees returns 21 employees from employees collection
UI Data Sheet -> Karyawan tab shows 21 employees with NIK, Nama, Email, Telepon, Jabatan, Department

UI inline edit shows edit input + Save/Cancel buttons

UI header shows 'Blueprint v2.4.0' in top right corner

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Data Sheet tabs and inline edit verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 tasks verified: Employee=Sales SSOT working (2 employees: ABDUL LATIF SLS-001, ADELLA SAFIRA SLS-002). Data Sheet Karyawan tab shows 21 employees from employees collection. Full Edit working for all 4 tabs (Products, Customers, Suppliers, Employees). Legacy /master/sales-persons page still uses old master_sales_persons collection (not Employee SSOT) - this is expected legacy behavior.

employee_sales_ssot.GET /api/erp/sales: 200 OK - 2 sales employees (ABDUL LATIF SLS-001, ADELLA SAFIRA SLS-002)
employee_sales_ssot.GET /api/sales/sales-persons: 200 OK - Same 2 employees from employees collection
